## Good company to deal with

Good company to deal with. Mark was fast with all communications and answered any questions I had. I requested for a slight alteration to one of the accessories that came with the kayak and that was fulfilled no problem. Fast delivery and happy with the kayak.

27 February 2025

Unprompted review

Aug 14, 2024

## Great service, great products.

About 12 years ago I bought a Sea Eagle inflatable kayak from Spindrift. It was a great product, high quality. Over the years I’ve paddled it in the sea off the Norfolk coast near my home, on the Norfolk Broads, on rivers and canals in France, off the Brittany coast; loads of places. The kayak was robust and capable. However, I finally managed to destroy the boat. I pumped it up to go for a paddle, and then when I got back to my campervan left it out in the hot sunshine to dry off without deflating it (the instructions that come with the kayak expressly warn you against doing this) while I went for refreshments. A couple of hours later I came back to a deflated kayak. The heat of the sun (it was a 30 degree plus day) had caused the air inside the kayak to expand, and that pressure caused the seams to come apart. I’ve taken the

# Vintres Reviews 2

•

3.8

Write a review Visit website

## We use technology to protect platform integrity, but we don't fact-check reviews

While we don't verify specific claims because reviewers' opinions are their own, we may label reviews as "Verified" when we can confirm a business interaction took place. Read more

To protect platform integrity, every review on our platform—verified or not—is screened by our 24/7 automated software. This technology is designed to identify and remove content that breaches our guidelines, including reviews that are not based on a genuine experience. We recognise we may not catch everything, and you can flag anything you think we may have missed. Read more

## Company details

### Written by the company

Vintres Wines curates and highlights the most highly awarded and sustainable family-owned hidden gems with wineries and vineyards worldwide. These are wines you won’t find in stores or on restaurant menus. We feature wines rated over 90 points from hundreds of sustainably-farmed vineyards and centuries of shared wine-making heritage across our worldwide wine destinations, all available for your tasting experience…in the comfort of your own home or business. Our mission is to help small family-owned wineries as their marketplace. These wines are shared in their vineyard tasting rooms or exclusive tastings with Vintres.See more

---

## Horrible customer service

Horrible customer service

Horrible customer service. I sent my machine in for repair in November after purchasing a 3D tool, part and extended warranty. 3 months later they still haven’t started the repair. Horrible customer service for a very expensive coffee maker.

## If I could give this comany a -1

If I could give this comany a -1

If I could give this comany a -1, I would. They market a really cool and amazing product. But I wills say buyer beware. Over the last year. Their customer support is horrible. Their product is NOT reliable. I've had my original Spinn for almost 2 years. It has broken down 4 times and it's alwasy been the water pump.
